name: YINSH
author: Abstract Games factory
description: YINSH (Kris Burm, GIPF project #5) on the 85-point hexagonal lattice. Place 5 rings, then each turn drop a marker inside one of your rings and slide that ring in a straight line, jumping the first run of markers it meets and flipping every marker jumped. Make a row of five of your colour to remove the row and one of your own rings. First to remove three rings wins.
